creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
dougb       2009-09-15 08:23:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ports-mgmt/portmaster Makefile 
  Added files:
    ports-mgmt/portmaster/files bash-completions zsh-completions 
  Log:
  Update for version 2.12
  
  Add OPTIONS to install programmable completion files for Bash and zsh.
  The Bash file is mine, the zsh file and installation suggestions are
  from the PR. Additional testing for the zsh completions from garga.
  
  PR:             ports/127319
  Submitted by:   Shota Iwazaki <iwazaki8@yahoo.co.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  2.12      +27 -2     ports/ports-mgmt/portmaster/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/ports-mgmt/portmaster/files/bash-completions (new)
  1.1       +68 -0     ports/ports-mgmt/portmaster/files/zsh-completions (new)
